root.description: Directory to search under. Must resolve inside the configured allowed_paths.

pattern.description: Go RE2 regex pattern to match against each line. Backreferences and lookahead are not supported by RE2; use a simpler form when the migration from another engine changes the syntax.

include_pattern.description: Glob matched against the full path of each candidate file (filepath.Match semantics: '*' matches any sequence, '?' matches a single character). Default: match every file.

case_sensitive.description: Whether the regex match is case-sensitive. Default false (case-insensitive).

max_depth.description: Maximum recursion depth below root. Default 8.

max_results.description: Hard cap on the number of match entries returned in the response. When the cap is hit, top-level truncated=true. Default 100.

context_lines.description: Number of context lines to include before and after each match. 0 disables context (matches only). Default 0.

max_line_bytes.description: Hard cap on the size of an individual line's content in the response. Lines exceeding this are truncated with per-entry truncated=true. Default 4096.

use_gitignore.description: Honor .gitignore files in root and parents. Default true.

respect_default_ignores.description: Skip a hardcoded list of noise directories (.git, .hg, .svn, node_modules, vendor, target, dist, build, .next, .turbo, .cache) and hidden files/dirs. Default true.

literal.description: If true, the pattern is matched as a literal substring via bytes.Index; regex metacharacters ('.', '*', '[', etc.) are treated as ordinary characters. The whole pattern is the search needle, so extractLiteralPrefix is not consulted. Default false.
